ref: but the son of the slave woman is also your son, and I will make his descendants into a great nation.”
text: Ni tšũlo̱yō le̱ bi le̱ hũ, *mahã etšṍ dšeṅmaṅ, edšake̱ oseši dšile̱. *
translated: You should not eat food that is not cooked, *especially rice, because it may contain weevils. *

ref: One day when Joseph's brothers had taken the sheep to a pasture near Shechem,
text: Ni enyemimei le̱ yiṅ ame̱te ame̱tše̱ tōi le̱ lè̱ *ye̱ Šekem. *
translated: Here is the translation of the Ga text: Ni enyemimei le̱ yiṅ ame̱te ame̱tše̱ tōi le̱ lè̱ *ye̱ Šekem. This translates to: "We are the ones who will meet at the place of Šekem."

ref: Shobal's sons were Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shepho, and Onam.
text: Ni Šobal bii ne̱: Alvan ke̱ Manahat ke̱ Ebal, Šefo ke̱ Onam.
translated: Ni Shobal be not: Alvan and Manahat and Ebal, Shefo and Onam.

ref: and everything happened just as he said it would. I got my job back, and the cook was put to death.
text: Ni eba mli ake̱, bo̱ni edšadše šiši etšõwo̱ le̱, nakai eba mli; mi le̱ aṅõmi ato migbe̱he ekoṅ, ni le̱ le̱ ase̱ṅle̱.
translated: I have not seen the snake, but someone said it was near the river, not I; we were sitting at the edge of the forest, I was sitting alone, we were not together.

ref: and he named the place Bethel. Before that it had been named Luz.
text: ni ewo dše̱i *Betel; ši sá le̱ nakai maṅ le̱ gbe̱i dši Luz. *
translated: Here is the Betel nut; this one is not ripe yet, but the Luz one is ripe.

ref: These heads of grain swallowed the full ones. I told my dreams to the magicians, but none of them could tell me the meaning of the dreams.
text: Ni abletšei legelegei le̱ mĩ abletšei kpakpai kpawo le̱. Ni midšadše ene̱ mitšõ woloṅlelo̱i le̱, ši mokomoko enaa he eko ekē̱ē̱mi.
translated: The book that I am reading now is not the one that I borrowed yesterday. The one I have now, I found it lying around.

ref: Laban and Bethuel answered, “The Lord has done this. We have no choice in the matter.
text: Ke̱ke̱ ni Laban ke̱ Betuel here no̱ ni ame̱kē̱: Iehowa ṅõ sane nē̱ dše̱; wo̱nyẽṅ wo̱ke̱o awie efõṅ lo ekpakpa.
translated: "Laban and Betuel's daughters do not deceive: The Lord God is with us; their kinsman will come from the direction of the camels."

ref: The servant explained: I am Abraham's servant.
That night they got their father drunk, and the older daughter got in bed with him, but he was too drunk even to know she was there.
text: Ni ame̱hã ame̱tše̱ wein enu nakai nyō le̱ṅ; ni onukpa le̱ yiṅ te, ni eke̱ etše̱ yawo̱; ni elee ešikãmo̱ mli lo ešitē mli.
translated:
[Here is the translation of the given Ga text into English:

Ni ame̱hã ame̱tše̱ wein enu nakai nyō le̱ṅ; ni onukpa le̱ yiṅ te, ni eke̱ etše̱ yawo̱; ni elee ešikãmo̱ mli lo ešitē mli.

"I don't know what you are talking about, but I understand your language; I can speak your language, but I don't understand your thoughts; I see your words, but I don't hear your heart."

ref: Then Joseph made his sons move away from Jacob's knees, and Joseph bowed down in front of him with his face to the ground.
text: Ni Iosef dšieame̱ ke̱-dše̱ enakutšei ateṅ ke̱-ba, ni eho ekoto ši, eṅõ ehĩe ebu ši.
translated: Joseph is not like everyone else, he is special, as he can do what others cannot.
